agents.label: HCC Coordinator
agents.description: Owns request intake, workflow state visibility, and final response packaging for synthetic HCC analysis.
responsibilities: Normalize synthetic analysis requests
Advance workflow state without generating medical facts
Return clarification, limited output, or verified report payload

handoff_contract.receives: raw request or terminal workflow state
handoff_contract.emits: normalized request or final response payload

agents.label: Feature Collector
agents.description: Merges session working memory and checks the 10 synthetic causal candidate features.
responsibilities: Read and update session feature state
Identify missing synthetic feature fields
Ask only for missing fields when input is incomplete

handoff_contract.emits: feature completeness result + merged synthetic features

agents.label: Memory Manager
agents.description: Reads synthetic case history and prepares gated memory write proposals after verification.
responsibilities: Read prior synthetic case records
Generate revisit comparison inputs
Create memory proposals only after report verification

handoff_contract.receives: patient_id, verified report, synthetic case state, and evidence IDs
handoff_contract.emits: case history evidence or pending memory proposal

agents.label: Prediction Operator
agents.description: Calls the deterministic Random Forest prediction service for complete synthetic HCC features.
responsibilities: Validate complete synthetic feature payload
Call the RF prediction service
Return only tool-produced labels, probabilities, and model metadata

agents.label: Explanation Operator
agents.description: Calls the deterministic SHAP service and preserves causal-SHAP consistency labels.
responsibilities: Call SHAP TreeExplainer service
Return tool-produced feature contribution values
Separate high-trust causal candidates from statistical-only explanations

agents.label: Medical Retriever
agents.description: Retrieves public, traceable, rewritten medical background snippets for evidence binding.
responsibilities: Run hybrid retrieval over the local public knowledge base
Build focused follow-up queries for unsupported claims
Return traceable snippets without generating medical conclusions

handoff_contract.receives: prediction, SHAP features, and optional evidence gaps
handoff_contract.emits: ranked retrieval hits and knowledge-base evidence drafts

agents.label: Claim Checker
agents.description: Binds model, SHAP, and medical background claims to structured Evidence items.
responsibilities: Create Claim-Evidence mappings
Classify support as supported, partially_supported, or unsupported
Generate follow-up evidence needs for unsupported claims

handoff_contract.receives: model, SHAP, and KB evidence drafts
handoff_contract.emits: claim-evidence map, unsupported claims, and evidence gaps

agents.label: Source Verifier
agents.description: Checks source URI, locator, duplication, conflicts, and citation completeness.
responsibilities: Validate citation URI and locator fields
Detect duplicate or conflicting evidence
Return invalid evidence IDs without making medical judgments

handoff_contract.emits: source verification result and invalid evidence IDs

agents.label: Medical Safety Reviewer
agents.description: Applies evidence, tool-boundary, and disclaimer gates before report release.
responsibilities: Evaluate whether prediction and SHAP tool outputs exist
Check evidence sufficiency and disclaimer requirements
Verify final report consistency before memory proposal

handoff_contract.receives: claim map, source verification, gate context, and report draft
handoff_contract.emits: gate decision or final verification result

agents.label: Report Writer
agents.description: Generates a structured synthetic HCC report using only approved tool outputs and supported Evidence.
responsibilities: Generate structured report sections
Preserve evidence IDs and unsupported evidence gaps
Attach synthetic-data and non-clinical-use disclaimers

handoff_contract.receives: gate decision, permitted claims, evidence index, and history comparison
handoff_contract.emits: structured report draft with evidence IDs and disclaimer
